# BP-138 negative variant: the hook delegates to a post-commit service.
lang: go
file: BP-138-variant-safe.go
variant: gorm-post-commit-delegation
---
package sample

import "gorm.io/gorm"

type Account struct{}

// AfterDelete queues an audit event for post-commit delivery.
func (a *Account) AfterDelete(tx *gorm.DB) error {
	queueAuditEvent(a)
	return nil
}

func queueAuditEvent(account *Account) {}
